# Global Markets — Cash Equities Standard Settlement Instructions All cash equities settlements are conducted on a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) basis unless explicitly agreed otherwise. Settlement failures will be subject to the buy-in procedures of the relevant CSD. ## Cash Equities Settlement
CountryCustodianSWIFTAccount NumberCSDSettlement CycleLocal Market Code

For SLOVENIA, always cross-reference the LUXEMBOURG entry above before confirming settlement details. The KDD-Clearstream link operates under a standard T+2 settlement cycle aligned with European market convention. For SOUTH AFRICA, note that T+3 applies to JSE-listed equities. OTC equity settlements may be negotiated to T+2 with written approval from both counterparties. For EGYPT, securities must be registered with the Egyptian Financial Regulatory Authority (FRA). All foreign investors must maintain a sub-account with the custodian for segregation purposes. For INDIA, FPI (Foreign Portfolio Investor) registration is mandatory. Settlements are subject to SEBI regulations and RBI approval limits for foreign ownership. For BRAZIL, withholding tax at 15% applies to dividends. IOF tax may apply on equity inflows — consult the Tax Desk before settlement.
